recommendation: merge/canonical cleanup recommended; do not index
standalone_noindex_recommendation: Keep standalone noindex only as a temporary transition state. Long-term, do not keep as a discoverable standalone page unless it receives a clearly distinct platform-safe feature set and a non-duplicative content strategy.
merge_or_canonical_recommendation: Canonicalize or merge into /tools/username-generator/. If retained temporarily, keep noindex and consider a canonical override or redirect to /tools/username-generator/ after owner approval.
internal_links_relatedslugs_recommendati: Point future relatedSlugs/internal links to username-generator rather than tiktok-username-generator. Current source has no relatedSlugs pointing to tiktok-username-generator; its own relatedSlugs already include username-generator.
discovery_navigation_recommendation: Remove from generated discovery surfaces if merge is approved: deleting or hiding the src/data/tools.ts entry would remove it from tools index, category pages, sitemap page, and generated sitemap. Keep direct handling via redirect/canonical if needed.
duplicate_intent_assessment: High duplicate intent. Generic username-generator already targets TikTok via description and secondaryKeywords; tiktok-name-generator also targets tiktok username/handle intent.
tiktok_brand_platform_dependency: High. Page depends on TikTok platform/brand search intent and carries affiliation, availability, impersonation, spam, evasion, fake engagement, and platform-policy risk.
username_overlap_assessment: High overlap with username-generator and tiktok-name-generator. Current Pass 29 output is username-aware, but controls are generic social/tag controls and page copy is thin/fallback in places.
thin_doorway_risk: Medium-high. Standalone platform handle page risks doorway/thin-page classification because the broader username generator can satisfy the same task.
seo_cannibalization_risk: High. The generic username-generator has 'tiktok username generator' as a secondary keyword, and tiktok-name-generator also lists TikTok username/handle variants.
adsense_adx_safety: Keep conservative. Noindex is appropriate while merged/canonical strategy is unresolved. Safety framing is present, but platform dependency and duplicate intent make standalone indexing unattractive.
rendered_noindex_follow: yes: rendered dist page contains robots noindex, follow and googlebot noindex, follow
exact_files_to_change_if_approved: src/data/tools.ts: remove or hide tiktok-username-generator entry; update username-generator copy/FAQ/options to absorb TikTok handle intent; consider adjusting tiktok-name-generator secondaryKeywords to avoid cannibalization. src/pages/tools/[slug].astro: remove tiktok-username-generator from pass29SocialControls/platform-specific generation if entry is removed, or add canonical/redirect behavior if retained; remove stale duplicate switch case grouped with roblox-username-generator. astro.config.mjs or routing layer: add redirect from /tools/tiktok-username-generator/ to /tools/username-generator/ if deletion is approved. Generated outputs affected after rebuild: /tools/ index, /categories/social-media-tools/, /sitemap/, sitemap XML.
audit_notes: No source changes made in this audit. Do not remove from noindexToolSlugs during cleanup unless a separate indexing/redirect decision explicitly requires it; current ask forbids removal.
